basic_details.job_title: South Indian Bank PO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out, Apply Online Starts July 22
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Shortlisting, Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview
basic_details.short_information: South Indian Bank Ltd. has released the South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Notification for the post of Probationary Officer (CA) in Scale I cadre. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for Chartered Accountants seeking a banking career with a scheduled commercial bank. Eligible candidates must have completed CA qualification and should be not more than 30 years of age (age relaxation applicable for SC/ST candidates).

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for this recruitment. The application fee is Nil for all categories.

age_limit.details: Maximum age: 30 years (as on 30 June 2026) Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates SC/ST candidates must submit attested copies of certificates from a competent authority to prove their category status when called for the Recruitment Process.

qualification.details: Eligibility is assessed as on 30 June 2026.

vacancy_details.details: The notification does not mention a specific number of vacancies for the Probationary Officer (CA) post. Applicants should check the Bank's official website for updates on vacancy numbers.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be placed in Scale I cadre and will be paid the IBA-approved scale of pay applicable to Scale I Officers, which includes Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Special Allowance, and other allowances. A Performance Linked Incentive will also be paid as per the scheme applicable to Scale I officers.

selection_process: Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview. Mere eligibility does not guarantee a call for the Recruitment Process. The Bank reserves the right to modify the selection process and decide the number of applicants called for the process
considering the number of applications received. Shortlisting of candidates will be solely at the Bank's discretion. In matters of eligibility and selection
and no further correspondence will be entertained.
how_to_apply: Ensure you fulfil all eligibility criteria for age and qualification before applying.
Register with a valid email ID in your own name.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload your photograph, signature, and resume as per the specified guidelines.
Review all details carefully, as the submitted application cannot be modified later.
Submit the application and note down the system-generated User ID (Application Reference ID) for future reference.
Check your registered email for a confirmation containing your application details and login credentials.
Log in to your profile to verify that your application status shows as successfully submitted.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for your own records. There is no need to send a physical copy to the Bank.
important_instructions: Apply only through the Bank's official online portal. Applications through any other mode will not be accepted, and all communication will be via official channels only. Multiple registrations for the same role will lead to disqualification. There is no provision to modify a submitted online application, so applicants should take utmost care while filling it in. All recruitment-related communication will be sent exclusively to the applicant's registered email address; no hard copy call letters will be sent. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. Applicants must appear for the Recruitment Process at their own cost. Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply. Appointment is subject to medical fitness, satisfactory background verification (including credit history and police clearance checks), and completion of other formalities as per the Bank's rules. Shortlisting is provisional and without verification of original documents; candidature is subject to verification of all details and documents at the time of interview, training, or joining. All revisions or corrigenda, if any, will be hosted only on the Bank's official website. By submitting the application, applicants consent to the collection, processing, storage, use, and disclosure of their personal information for purposes connected with the recruitment process, in accordance with applicable data protection laws. Access to the website may be delayed near the closing date due to heavy internet traffic; applicants are advised to avoid last-minute submission.

Candidates who are Chartered Accountants can also explore more CA Jobs in Banks and Bank PO Recruitment notifications from other banks. Those interested in officer-level banking careers may also check Private Bank Jobs and Scale I Officer Recruitment openings across India.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Out
content_sections.text: South Indian Bank Ltd., a premier scheduled commercial bank in India, has invited online applications from Indian Nationals for the post of Probationary Officer (CA) in Scale I cadre. Eligible Chartered Accountants can apply only through the Bank's official website. Online applications are open from 22 July 2026 to 29 July 2026. The Bank has also issued an advisory to beware of fraudulent job alerts and to apply only through its official portal, as applications through any other mode will not be accepted. Notification PDF: Download South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply Link: Direct Link to South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Official Website: Check Here

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

rows.details: Anywhere in India (at the sole discretion of the Bank)
Shortlisting, Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
South Indian Bank PO (CA) Vacancy 2026 Details
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention a specific number of vacancies for the Probationary Officer (CA) post. Applicants should check the Bank's official website for updates on vacancy numbers.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility is assessed as on 30 June 2026.

rows.details: Not more than 30 years (5 years relaxation for SC/ST candidates)

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum age: 30 years (as on 30 June 2026) Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates SC/ST candidates must submit attested copies of certificates from a competent authority to prove their category status when called for the Recruitment Process.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Salary Structure 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be placed in Scale I cadre and will be paid the IBA-approved scale of pay applicable to Scale I Officers, which includes Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Special Allowance, and other allowances. A Performance Linked Incentive will also be paid as per the scheme applicable to Scale I officers.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Terms of Employment
content_sections.text: Selected candidates must execute a service agreement to serve the Bank for a minimum of 2 years (active service) from the date of joining. If a candidate leaves before completing this period, they must pay Rs. 1,50,000 towards recruitment and training expenses and compensation for loss of opportunity to the Bank.

rows.details: 1 year; confirmation subject to satisfactory performance during probation
Anywhere in India (at the sole discretion of the Bank)

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: There is no application fee for this recruitment. The application fee is Nil for all categories.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be through Shortlisting, Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview. Mere eligibility does not guarantee a call for the Recruitment Process. The Bank reserves the right to modify the selection process and decide the number of applicants called for the process, considering the number of applications received. Shortlisting of candidates will be solely at the Bank's discretion. In matters of eligibility and selection, the Bank's decision is final, and no further correspondence will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for South Indian Bank PO (CA) Application
content_sections.text: Recent passport-size color photograph (white background; resolution 378 x 437 pixels; file size not exceeding 50KB; no caps, hats, or dark glasses) Signature signed in black ink on white paper (resolution 140 x 110 pixels; file size not exceeding 50KB) Resume in PDF format (file size not exceeding 1MB) Valid, active email ID and contact number registered in the applicant's own name Attested copies of caste certificates from a competent authority (for SC/ST candidates claiming age relaxation)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Ensure you fulfil all eligibility criteria for age and qualification before applying. Visit the official website: www.southindianbank.bank.in Register with a valid email ID in your own name. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and contact details. Upload your photograph, signature, and resume as per the specified guidelines. Review all details carefully, as the submitted application cannot be modified later. Submit the application and note down the system-generated User ID (Application Reference ID) for future reference. Check your registered email for a confirmation containing your application details and login credentials. Log in to your profile to verify that your application status shows as successfully submitted. Keep a copy of the submitted application for your own records. There is no need to send a physical copy to the Bank.

content_sections.heading: South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Apply only through the Bank's official online portal. Applications through any other mode will not be accepted, and all communication will be via official channels only. Multiple registrations for the same role will lead to disqualification. There is no provision to modify a submitted online application, so applicants should take utmost care while filling it in. All recruitment-related communication will be sent exclusively to the applicant's registered email address; no hard copy call letters will be sent. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. Applicants must appear for the Recruitment Process at their own cost. Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply. Appointment is subject to medical fitness, satisfactory background verification (including credit history and police clearance checks), and completion of other formalities as per the Bank's rules. Shortlisting is provisional and without verification of original documents; candidature is subject to verification of all details and documents at the time of interview, training, or joining. All revisions or corrigenda, if any, will be hosted only on the Bank's official website. By submitting the application, applicants consent to the collection, processing, storage, use, and disclosure of their personal information for purposes connected with the recruitment process, in accordance with applicable data protection laws. Access to the website may be delayed near the closing date due to heavy internet traffic; applicants are advised to avoid last-minute submission. Candidates who are Chartered Accountants can also explore more CA Jobs in Banks and Bank PO Recruitment notifications from other banks. Those interested in officer-level banking careers may also check Private Bank Jobs and Scale I Officer Recruitment openings across India.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for South Indian Bank PO (CA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 29 July 2026. Applications opened on 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for South Indian Bank PO (CA)?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for South Indian Bank PO (CA) recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must not be more than 30 years of age as on 30 June 2026, with a 5-year age relaxation for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for South Indian Bank PO (CA) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application fee is Nil for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary of a South Indian Bank Probationary Officer?
faq.answer: Selected candidates receive the IBA-approved Scale I pay scale, including DA, HRA, Special Allowance, other allowances, and a Performance Linked Incentive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for South Indian Bank PO (CA)?
faq.answer: Selection is based on shortlisting followed by a Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview, at the Bank's discretion.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a service bond for South Indian Bank PO (CA) recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. Selected candidates must serve a minimum of 2 years; leaving before this period requires payment of Rs. 1,50,000 to the Bank.

faq.question: Q8. Where will South Indian Bank PO (CA) be posted?
faq.answer: Posting can be anywhere in India, at the sole discretion of the Bank. Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply.
